settings.heading: Stay in the Glow
settings.subtext: Be the first to discover skincare secrets, exclusive deals, and the latest from Dermatify. Your glow-up starts here!

settings.heading: Our Mission
settings.subtext:
At Dermatify, our mission is to redefine skincare as self-care. We’re here to empower women with thoughtfully curated Korean beauty products that deliver real results while embracing confidence, individuality, and self-expression.

We believe your skincare routine should be more than a habit—it should be your moment to feel unstoppable, beautiful, and uniquely you.

settings.heading: Meet Dermatify
settings.subtext:
At Dermatify, we believe skincare is self-care. We curate the best of Korean beauty to empower confidence, simplify routines, and celebrate individuality.

This is your moment to honor the skin you’re in.

settings.enabled_payment_types: american_express, discover, master, paypal, visa, jcb, venmo, diners_club
